column1: Hey Karen, thanks for your interest in traveling with Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
What's good! It's Spiffy from Go Blue here
Thank you I was just going to text you today. It's March 7. Is it a full week? Can it be five nights?
Yea 5 nights is the sweet spot. we can do flights but its typically a lot cheaper for you to get those separately on your own
Which destination were you lookin to book?
Cancun and 5 nights is perfect and we can book
okay got you. how many ppl in your group so far?
yea thats solid! you all from the same school?
oh bet you we got a couple groups from your school rollin with us!
y'all def know how to party lol
True! Please let me know a quote for the five nights and Is transportation to and from airport included? Thanks
Should I call you or we just keep texting?
either or works! Ill send an email right now with the full breakdown and then we can hop on a call afterward for a deeper dive if needed?
yea np whats the best email to send to?
just sent that over let me know if you got it
Got it! I'll Review and get back to u after an hour or so
Is there any chance we can make the deposit January 3 instead of by the end of the year? We can do it. We just need a few more days.
yea I can do that for y'all!

That's amazing because we're not talking as a group until just after the new year then I am certain we can make that deposit no problem so thank you. I will also discuss with them the four or five nights. What is your surcharge for booking flight flights as well?
okay yea np! and yea for flights, its not really a surcharge for us, just costs us more for group contract quotes than what is readily available online
because of the high travel demand for March, they tend to over index on group booking fares
OK, so thank you. It sounds like your best advice is that we book our own flights and still transportation from the airport can be with you.
more than happy to do it for you to make it easy, but you'll save $150-200 doing it separately
Thank you so much we will do it separately
It sounds like it might include a few cover charges and parties

I didn't see that much about the passes to parties and what else is included besides food so if you could include just a detail of that for the five nights that would help thank you so much but if I missed it, just let me know where to look
I would also like to know about the off resort party package. And what that includes. Is it best to set up a call? I'm available after 1:30 PM or right now
yea I can give you a call now np
Liked “yea I can give you a call now np”
Hi Karen! Happy new year. how are thiings looking for the group?
We're hopefully all Talking this afternoon- it was quiet for new years now we're picking back up the discussion - thx for checking in
Okay got it! yea np just let me know
Good morning- Is it an option for only four to go and get The same rate (one room)-
Hi good morning. Yup so four to one room, at the same rate per person
Are we still looking at Cancun?
You were going to get back to me about the trolleys and when it leaves clubs To go back to hotel- u weren't perfectly sure when we last spoke
Ahh yes! That comes by every 15 mins
Liked “Ahh yes! That comes by every 15 mins”
Hi again - we have a firm yes for five girls- is there anyway To have five girls in one room?
Unfortunately not. Max occupancy for rooms is 4. So we would have to do a room of 3 and one room of 2
Ok what would that price be per person?
We will be ready for our deposit tomorrow around 4pm
Sounds good. We're going with our Grand Oasis package right?

Yes. Do have any reviews from spring breakers because a couple parents are doing random google Reviews and seeing things that aren't good but my feeling is those are adults trying to vacation and it's not representative of the spring breakers
I will say tho, the food is definitely middle of the road. Those reviews are true
Most spring breakers aren't necessarily there for the food tho
Liked “Most spring breakers aren't necessarily there for the food tho”
Is there a bigger difference in quality of experience with the other Krystal Cancun hotel - it appears about $100 more per person?

not a huge difference, but definitely noticeable. The krystal overall is nicer/cleaner and rooms are better kept, and food is overall better as well. It's a bit more laid back than the oasis though in terms of spring break vibe/energy
Really depends on if you want more of a college spring break or a more laid back experience, but the krystal does offer nicer amenities
Ok perfect thanks for that reply
Ok we are a yes for 7 girls two rooms and I'll Cover the 8th person so would like to keep all pricing based upon 8 people will that work?? We're ready to make the deposit
Okay yea! Will work on that now. So 7 including you? And did you want the Krystal or Grand O package
We will do the Grand O and there is only 7 people but I want their pricing to be the same so I'll pay for an 8th person - if we find one then great and if not, it's ok -does that make sense?
Pleasea advise next steps -buying flights asap so please just confirm we're a go!

Yea March 7-12 right? And I'll just adjust pricing so that you're not stuck paying two full slots. I'll adjust your balance so that you can cover the remaining balance on the 3 person occupancy room. If you find an 8th, we'll adjust
It's March 7-11 for four nights - and Thank you so much! Please let me know how to proceed with deposit - OK !
perfect will send you the reservation link in 5-10 mins!
just emailed it all over! added an explanation on how to navigate through and get situated
let me know if anyone needs help
I'd like to just pay the deposit for everyone now and then get paid back or it will not happen today - can you just either give me a quick call or just tell me how to pay the deposit for 8?
Ill give you a call yup! I have a way to do it
Goo morning- can u advise how I pay for the $210 Three night party package add on? I selected it but don't see where to pay
Hi good morning! yes let me check it out

Hey just an update, our ops team is transferring the deposit payment to the accounts still, once that is cleared you'll have a balance for the party package and be able to make that payment. I will notify you as soon as thats ready
Ok so does each traveler add their own "add on" party package? That's what it seems. Thank you
yup! did everyone want it added? I can do it for each slot
Yes everyone wants it thank you!
The others besides Sammy and Sarah travelers need to fill theirs out today and I'l remind them this afternoon if it's not completed by end of day

Hi- checking in because I just added Sarah Brandon’s flight info and the email states “the button to access the vouchers for your trip will become available once your flight information is entered” but I don’t see that- please advise
Looks like our ops team hasen't released vouchers for the reservation yet. has everyone in the group entered their flight info?
Don't know I just know I did for Sarah's - I can ask the group but we have time
no worries. that just may be why vouchers havent been released. you all havent entered the pre departure phase yet
once our ops team gets to your reservation, all flights are uploaded, and they are able to proceed, is when vouchers will be released onto your account

Hi- checking in about the march 7 trip for Sarah Brandon group- waiting on vouchers- I think all flight info is in- can u see on your end and when do we receive instructions on their transportation? And what do u know about how far clubs are from hotel? Parents worried as u can imagine with Mexico news

Hi Karen, totally understand the concern. Vouchers and transportation info will be sent out tomorrow! Nightclubs are 5 miles from the resort, very short ride. All within the hotel zone which has plenty of security. The US Embassy has released that travel to Cancun is back to normal
We'll have our onsite staff there to help with anything they need
Thank you! Also can you please share what restaurants at the hotel are included in their all inclusive package - is there any specific places they have to eat?

Yup! there are main dining areas that are available to everyone on the resort. and then there are a few specialty restaurants they can make reservations for on arrival. our on site staff will walk them through everything and give them a short tour/explanation
Great - are those specialty restaurants additional to the all inclusive?
those are included, at a first come first serve basis for reservations
Liked “those are included, at a first come first serve basis for reservations”
Sorry to bother but still not seeing vouchers - will those be emailed ? I'm logged in and dont' see -
Hi, yes those will be added in. We're waiting on Olivia and Eleanor's flight info. do you have any intel on if they are on the same flight as anyone else?
Shoot hold on - I'll reach out to the moms
I saw something that flight information cannot be entered after two weeks prior to the trip so can you advise what steps they should take? Should they contact you directly?
Yes did they try adding it in on their end? It may still allow them to. If not, I can do it for them
Ok I asked them to try and text u if needed-thx for your help
We should be set for all travelers can u confirm then release whatever info they need?

We did receive all the info via email and the vouchers. I see they will be picked up 4 hours prior to their flight departure on March 11. However, will there be a sign or something at hotel indicating it's the proper transportation for them? I ask because recently in Cabo we got in the wrong transport to the hotel and it was a mess.
Hi, they will be on the resort with our on site staff who will direct them to their transportation at the end of their trip
Our staff will be in the lobby
My daughter is 30 Min earlier Departure than others so will there be multiple vans I assume at different times?
They will more than likely all be on the same shuttle to the airport if flights are that close in tike
So then still go To lobby four hours prior To her departure or the ones that are thirty min later?

Sorry I may not be understanding the question. I will say this though, when the group arrives they will be greeted by our on site staff that will give them an orientation about the resort, the trip, amenities, events happening, where to be, when, etc. They will fully break down shuttle times, where to find them, where to find staff throughout the day, etc. The girls won't be on their own at all and will be given all the information they need
Throughout the day they will be able to stop by our desk and ask any question they have
They will be given their shuttle times towards the end of the trip as well
Hi! Girls on their way to Cancun. Flight delayed but according to paperwork the transportation will be aware of that- is there any further info I need to provide?
Yup they are tracking their flight #
Loved “Yup they are tracking their flight #”

Hi again - you mentioned the girls would get info upon arrival on their departing transportation to airport tomorrow but they did not. There are different flight times - who can they speak with about what time they should depart?
Hi. they can head down to the hospitality desk in the lobby where they stopped during check in and get that info. they have the full departures list
